title: Add Contextual Message to Loading Screen
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see a descriptive message on the loading screen while the application processes my request, so that I know the system is working and what it is doing.
description:
The loading screen was updated to display contextual messages instead of a blank spinner:

1. **Default message**: "DataToolsPro is working. Please wait..."
2. **API request message**: When a request is sent to the API, the message dynamically updates to reflect the current operation

Future enhancement: Replace the generic loading GIF with the DataTools Pro logo.
acceptance_criteria: Loading screen displays a default message: 'DataToolsPro is working. Please wait...'
Message updates dynamically when an API request is in progress to describe the operation
Loading spinner/GIF is displayed alongside the message
ux_changes: Loading screen now shows a contextual message that starts with a default 'DataToolsPro is working. Please wait...' and updates dynamically based on the current API operation.
implementation_notes: The loading screen message is set to a default value on page load and is updated via JavaScript when API requests are initiated. A future iteration will replace the loading GIF with the DataTools Pro logo.
comment_summary: Developer added the default and dynamic loading messages, shared a screenshot of the implementation, and suggested replacing the GIF with the DataTools logo in a future iteration.
